rows.value: NORTHEAST OPS - RWY 05 arrivals and RWY 05 departures
Use the Approach_ILS_RWY05 sheet as the hard path. Use STAR/SID sheets only to feed aircraft toward vectors, then force localizer capture at CALEY/PEAAY/ORF05_INT gates.

rows.when_to_use: Runway 05 takeoff, landing, short final handoff

rows.notes: PRIMARY NE ops runway. Use for arrivals, departures, ILS,
Use NUTZE transition only when spawned from southwest/south.
Hold aircraft above 9,000 until KOHLS stream is established; then descend for sequencing.
Primary arrival merge fix for KOHLS ONE.
After DRONE, give radar vectors to RWY 05 final.
Controller-created base leg. Turn aircraft southeast/east to intercept 047 localizer.
12 NM final intercept gate; switch to ILS path sheet after this point.
Harcum transition stream from west/northwest.
Reduce and descend for terminal merge.
Set up east side vectoring.
OUTLA ONE merge fix; start sequencing to RWY 05.
Use this as east/northeast vector staging for RWY 05.
Controller-created downwind/base vector; turn inbound to 047 final.
12 NM final intercept gate; switch to ILS path sheet after this point.
Climb runway heading 047 to 526 ft.
Cross VABCH at or above 2,000.
Maintain 4,000; expect filed altitude 10 min after departure.
Assigned transition; OUTLA transition for turboprops/props only.
Climb runway heading 047 to 526 ft.
Cross SCTYP at or above 2,000.
Maintain 4,000; expect filed altitude 10 min after departure.
Transition options include HCM/EYOBI/HYTRA/KELLE/PBCUP/RDU/SHLBK/THHMP; HCM turboprops/props only; THHMP assigned by ATC.
Climb runway heading 047 to 526 ft.
Use for south/southeast/eastbound departures. Maintain 4,000 top altitude.
RNAV1, RADAR required. Use assigned transition for routing.
Assign CHIEZ/ELLDE/JOHAR/KOOKI/PRONI/SKARP/GUMPP style route depending on exit direction.
Use as first ILS capture point. Plate shows CALEY I-ORF 12.6, RADAR, 2100.
FAF. Plate profile shows 1600 at PEAAY and FAF-to-MAP 4.8 NM.
LOC/DME check point; use 820 ft as gate for LOC-only/check logic.
Use for short final stability check and tower handoff if not already switched.
Threshold/landing event. TDZE 26, runway landing distance listed 7809 on approach plate.
Climb to 2000 direct Cape Charles CCV VORTAC and hold.
Radar vectors to Lamberts Point Terminal. Recommended 2500.
Proceed visually along Elizabeth River to extended RWY 05 centerline.
I-ORF and MALSR available for supplemental guidance.
Procedure not authorized at night; weather minimums 2100 ceiling and 5 miles visibility.

rows.weather_minimum_note: ILS minimums on chart; use ILS for IMC or default sim approach.
Not included in first path; use for non-ILS expansion.
Radar required; 2100 ft ceiling and 5 SM visibility.

rows.trigger_condition: Aircraft enters KOHLS1/OUTLA1 route at first fix
rows.game_rule: Follow STAR sequence until expected_action = expect_vectors
rows.notes: Do not let sim aircraft free-roam after final STAR fix.

rows.game_rule: Use 210-220 kts; descend to 030 before intercept
rows.notes: Keep aircraft below 3000-4000 before localizer intercept.

rows.trigger_condition: Within 12-13 NM final, assigned intercept heading within 30 degrees of 047
rows.game_rule: Snap lateral nav to ILS_OR_LOC_RWY05 path at CALEY or ORF05_INT
rows.notes: This fixes the running-around problem.

rows.trigger_condition: Aircraft inbound to CALEY/PEAAY and altitude 030 or below
rows.controller_instruction: maintain 030 until established, cleared ILS runway 05 approach
rows.game_rule: After established, descend on 3.00 degree slope
rows.notes: Glideslope altitude approx distance_nm * 300 + TDZE.

rows.game_rule: Altitude should be 016 and speed 170 or below
rows.notes: Stable by FAF.

rows.trigger_condition: Inside 5 NM final or at ACUNO/I-ORF 1.5 gate
rows.game_rule: No more approach vectors after this
rows.notes: Tower clears to land.

rows.trigger_condition: Aircraft distance 0.0 NM threshold and speed <= 150
rows.notes: RWY 05 threshold event.

rows.game_rule: Use assigned SID sheet; top altitude 040
rows.notes: HOLND/NUTIY/SWOPE all use 4000 top altitude in current chart cycle.
Basic vector to base/downwind/final.
Use 210 downwind/base, 180 intercept, 170 FAF, 140 final.

rows.controller_phrase: {callsign}, turn {turn_direction} heading {heading}, join the localizer runway 05
rows.notes: Use before approach clearance.

rows.controller_phrase: {callsign}, {distance} miles from {fix}, maintain {altitude} until established, cleared ILS runway 05 approach
rows.notes: Example: 12 miles from CALEY, maintain 030 until established.
Use inside 5 NM or after established inbound.
After takeoff RWY 05.

rows.data_used: Confirms current KORF procedures: KOHLS ONE, OUTLA ONE, HOLND ONE, NUTIY ONE, SWOPE ONE, ILS/LOC RWY 05, River Visual RWY 05, Airport Diagram.
Runway length/width, headings, field elevation, tower/ground/ATIS, closed crosswind markings.
Localizer frequency/course, ILS path, CALEY/PEAAY/ACUNO, GS, TCH, FAF-to-MAP, missed approach, frequencies.
Visual route, Lamberts Point Terminal, Elizabeth River, weather/night restrictions, frequencies.
KOHLS arrival fix sequence and DRONE/vector-to-final instructions.
OUTLA arrival fix sequence, transition limitations, APP/ATIS information.
RWY 05 departure heading, VABCH, HOLND, top altitude 4000, departure frequency.
RWY 05 departure heading, SCTYP, NUTIY, top altitude 4000, departure frequency.
SWOPE departure structure, top altitude 4000, departure frequency.

rows.Specific, non-ambiguous sim dataset for: Arrivals: KOHLS1/OUTLA1 -> vectors -> ILS RWY 05. Departures: RWY 05 using HOLND1/NUTIY1/SWOPE1.
Aircraft must transition from STAR to VECTOR to LOCALIZER_CAPTURE at CALEY/ORF05_INT. Do not use STAR points all the way to landing.
Lat/lon values for runway/threshold are practical sim values; several procedure fixes are approximate for gameplay pathing. FAA source procedures govern names/courses/altitudes.
Not for navigation. For simulation/game backend only.
Visual_RWY05 may replace Approach_ILS_RWY05 only under VMC/day visual conditions.
Runways -> SIDs_ORF05 -> Frequencies. Tower 120.8 then Departure 125.2.
FAA d-TPP 2604, effective 16 APR 2026 to 14 MAY 2026 as shown on PDFs.
